title: Finn (disambiguation)
content:
'''Finn''' can refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Finn]]''', a [[First Order]] [[stormtrooper]] turned [[Resistance]] member
*'''[[Finn Ertay]]''', a [[Twi'lek]] [[Jedi]] during the [[Clone Wars]]

==Legends==
*'''[[Finn (bartender)|Finn]]''', a [[Sakiyan/Legends|Sakiyan]] bartender at [[Rik's Cantina/Legends|Rik's Cantina]]
*'''[[Finn (boy)|Finn]]''', a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|boy]] living on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]
*'''[[Finn (Herdessan)|Finn]]''', a resistance leader on [[Herdessa/Legends|Herdessa]]
*'''[[Finn (pilot)|Finn]]''', an Imperial [[TIE pilot]] attached to [[Crimson Squadron (Galactic Empire)|Crimson Squadron]]
*'''[[Finn (Sith)|Finn]]''', a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sith Master/Legends|Sith Master]]
*'''[[Finn Darktrin]]''', an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Spy/Legends|agent]]
*'''[[Finn Ertay/Legends|Finn Ertay]]''', a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]
*'''[[Finn Galfridian]]''', a Jedi during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]
*'''[[Finn Shallo]]''', an employee of the [[Corellia Times]]
*'''[[Finn Tegotash]]''', a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]]
*'''[[Finn Vaal]]''', a [[Keshiri/Legends|Keshiri]]
*'''[[Finn Varatha]]''', a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]]
*'''[[Raylen Finn]]''', a male human [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]]
*'''[[Ryoo Finn]]''', a male [[Arcona/Legends|Arcona]] drug addict

{{Disambig}}
